zh.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin是Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin的兒子，於1098年出生在德國薩辛德累斯頓。他於1119年與Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein在薩辛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1157年住在德國薩辛薩阿爾可萊斯比特斯波格。他去世於1157年2月5日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿爾可萊斯比特斯波格享年59歲，埋葬在薩辛-阿爾波格維斯特可萊斯比特斯波格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin是Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin的儿子，于1098年出生在德国薩辛德累斯頓。他于1119年与Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein在薩辛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1157年住在德国薩辛薩阿爾可萊斯比特斯波格。他去世于1157年2月5日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特薩阿爾可萊斯比特斯波格享年59岁，埋葬在薩辛-阿爾波格維斯特可萊斯比特斯波格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meißen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Ernst.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Mein   1.

variants.name: Mein
meanings: German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, Meino, a short form of various compound names with the first element magin ‘strength, might’, for example Meinhardt . Compare Main 7.
German: nickname from Middle High German mein ‘mean, nasty’.

Scottish and English: perhaps a variant of Main or Meen. Meen is either a nickname from Middle English mene ‘inferior, lowly; poor; unpleasant’, from the Middle English personal name Mene (which is of uncertain origin). Alternatively, it could conceivably be a habitational name from East and West Meon (Hampshire), which take their names from the river Meon (of unexplained etymology).

nameMeanings.name: Konrad

en.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin was born in 1098, in Dresden, Saxony, Germany as the son of Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin. He married Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein in 1119, in Saxony. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Petersberg, Saalkreis, Saxony, Germany in 1157. He died on 5 February 1157, in Petersberg, Saalkreis, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 59, and was buried in Petersberg, Westkreis, Saxe-Altenburg.

fr.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin est né en 1098, à Dresden, Sachsen, Allemagne, fils de Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin. Il a épousé Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein en 1119, à Sachsen. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Allemagne en 1157. Il est décédé le 5 février 1157, à Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Petersberg, Westkreis, Sachsen-Altenburg.

de.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin wurde 1098 in Dresden, Sachsen, Deutschland, als Sohn von Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin geboren. Er hat 1119 in Sachsen Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1157 hat er in Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Deutschland gelebt. Er starb am 5. Februar 1157 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Petersberg, Westkreis, Sachsen-Altenburg begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin è nato il nel 1098 nel Dresden, Sachsen, Germania come figlio di Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin. Lui sposato Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein nel 1119, nel Sachsen. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Germania nel 1157. Morì il 5 febbraio 1157, nel Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Petersberg, Westkreis, Sachsen-Altenburg.

ja.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettinは1098年にドイツサチセンドレスデンでCount Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettinの息子として生まれた。1119年にサチセンでGräfin Luitgard von Ravensteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1157年にはドイツサチセンサアルクレイスペテルスバーグに住んでいた。彼は1157年2月5日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトサアルクレイスペテルスバーグで59歳で死去し，サチセン-アルテンブルグウエストクレイスペテルスバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin(은)는 1098년 독일 작센 드레즈든에서 Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1119년 작센에서 Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1157년도에 독일 작센 사알크레이스 피터스버그에서 살았다. 그는 1157년 2월 5일 독일 작센-아할트 사알크레이스 피터스버그에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 작센-알텐버그 웨스트크레이스 피터스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin nasceu em 1098, em Dresden, Sachsen, Alemanha filho de Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin. Ele casou-se com Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein em 1119, em Sachsen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Alemanha em 1157. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1157, em Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Petersberg, Westkreis, Sachsen-Altenburg.

ru.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin родился в 1098 г. в местности дресден, сачсен, Германия. Его отца звали Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin. Он женился на женщине по имени Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein в 1119 г. в местности сачсен. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности питирсбирг, саалкрис, сачсен, Германия в 1157 году. Он умер 5 февраля 1157 г. в местности питирсбирг, саалкрис, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности питирсбирг, весткрис, сачсен-алтенбург.

es.lifeSummary: Konrad I. von Meißen Graf von Wettin nació en 1098, en Dresden, Sachsen, Alemania como hijo de Count Timo I "The Brave" Of Wettin. Se casó con Gräfin Luitgard von Ravenstein en 1119, en Sachsen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen, Alemania en 1157. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1157, en Petersberg, Saalkreis, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Petersberg, Westkreis, Sachsen-Altenburg.
